name: Infection
description: AST-based mutation testing framework for PHP that mutates source code and verifies that the test suite catches the mutations, scoring test quality.

seo.title: Infection — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Infection: AST-based mutation testing framework for PHP that mutates source code and verifies that the test suite catches the mutations, scoring test quality.

when_to_use: Mutation testing to score PHP test suite effectiveness
Catch untested code paths by injecting AST mutations
CI gate requiring minimum mutation score percentage
Identify dead test code with no mutation coverage

pros: Mutation testing exposes weak PHPUnit coverage
Scores tests, not just lines hit
cons: Full runs are very slow, needs parallelism
review.verdict: The honest verdict on PHP test quality, worth the runtime pain on critical code paths.
review.best_for: PHP teams hardening core business logic with real test-quality metrics
review.not_for: Teams still fighting flaky tests or lacking CI budget for long runs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
